tagline: Enhancements to API and user experience for improved functionality.
what_it_does: The Genie Agent API now includes a new endpoint that allows users to download full query results up to approximately 1 GB. Additionally, issues with chart generation from prompts have been fixed, enabling seamless visualization creation. Error messages are now displayed in a collapsible modal, enhancing readability, and users receive warnings about catalog permissions before SQL execution, preventing runtime errors.
why_it_matters: These improvements enhance user productivity by streamlining data retrieval and visualization processes, reducing frustration from error messages, and ensuring users are informed about permission issues upfront. This leads to a more efficient workflow and better user experience, ultimately supporting data-driven decision-making.
plain_summary: The Genie Agent has improved its API and user experience with better data downloads, chart generation, and error handling.

capabilities.title: Full Query Result Downloads
capabilities.desc: A new API endpoint allows downloading complete result sets up to about 1 GB.

capabilities.title: Fixed Chart Generation
capabilities.desc: Resolved issues with generating charts directly from prompts.

capabilities.title: Collapsible Error Messages
capabilities.desc: Errors are now displayed in a collapsible modal for better readability.

capabilities.title: Catalog Permission Warnings
capabilities.desc: Users receive warnings about missing permissions on attached tables before SQL execution.

key_takeaway: The Genie Agent's API enhancements significantly improve user experience and data handling capabilities.
